completion_promises.criterion_text: from fleet_memory.fixture import FixtureManifest, compute_content_hash, read_manifest, write_manifest works, plus the four error types
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented full fixture package with error taxonomy, manifest model, and utility functions. Updated fixture_dir signature to match test expectations.

completion_promises.criterion_text: compute_content_hash returns the same digest for the same file bytes regardless of file mtimes and of creation order, and a different digest when any payload byte or filename changes
completion_promises.evidence: compute_content_hash deterministic over sorted relative paths and includes filenames; tests verify determinism and sensitivity.

completion_promises.criterion_text: manifest.json is excluded from its own hash (writing the manifest does not invalidate the hash)
completion_promises.evidence: compute_content_hash skips manifest.json; write_manifest creates manifest after hash computation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: read_manifest on a missing fixture directory raises UnknownFixtureError naming the fixture id
completion_promises.evidence: read_manifest raises UnknownFixtureError when manifest.json absent.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Invalid fixture_id (empty, path separators, ..) is rejected with a clear error
completion_promises.evidence: fixture_dir validates fixture_id pattern and path traversal, raising ValueError.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No file outside src/fleet_memory/fixture/, tests/, and .gitignore is created or modified
completion_promises.evidence: All changes confined to src/fleet_memory/fixture/__init__.py; test suite adds no new files.
